title: Friendly Fluffy British Gouda Cheese Casserole
description: A malty, chewy, kid-friendly British dish featuring Gouda cheese, with a diabetic-friendly twist, this casserole is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the pasta according to package directions until al dente.
In a medium saucepan, whisk together the milk, flour, and melted butter to make a mother sauce.
Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook until it thickens.
Remove the sauce from heat and stir in the shredded Gouda cheese until melted.
Add the cooked pasta, thyme, salt, and pepper to the cheese sauce and stir until combined.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Top the casserole with additional shredded Gouda cheese if desired.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 25 minutes or until golden brown on top.
